missionFrame.function: A lattice surge tears open a Crown Station habitat during the Eudora Vale's approach. Captain Nasrin Rhee leads a shuttle evacuation while the XO coordinates the ship, and a secondary inversion kills Rhee after the evacuees transport clear, forcing the player to assume command and choose where the system will carry the emergency load.
missionFrame.dramaticQuestion: What kind of captain does the player become when their first command decision must make one population carry a cost?

forbiddenOutcomes: end The Broken Accord from a single failed check
remove player agency from command decisions
resolve the lattice burden without authored evidence

phases.title: Approach to Crown Station
phases.summary: The player runs the approach briefing as principal mission commander while Captain Rhee retains the chair and the ship reviews contradictory lattice telemetry.
objectives: Separate official telemetry from raw anomalies.
pressures: Crown Station requests a demonstration sync.
Rhee expects the XO to lead the operational briefing.
phases.directorPurpose: The player runs the approach briefing as principal mission commander while Captain Rhee retains the chair and the ship reviews contradictory lattice telemetry.
playerFacingObjectives: Separate official telemetry from raw anomalies.

phases.title: The Lattice Surges
phases.summary: A phase inversion ruptures a maintenance habitat, throws traffic off stable lanes, and begins transferring uncontrolled load toward multiple worlds.
objectives: Establish which node loads can be shed or bridged.
pressures: Gravity and life support fail in different sections.
The ship can synchronize only briefly.
phases.directorPurpose: A phase inversion ruptures a maintenance habitat, throws traffic off stable lanes, and begins transferring uncontrolled load toward multiple worlds.
playerFacingObjectives: Establish which node loads can be shed or bridged.

phases.title: Rhee Takes the Shuttle
phases.summary: Captain Rhee leads the final shuttle extraction while the player commands the Eudora Vale, transporters, traffic control, and load response.
objectives: Prevent the station from becoming a debris cascade.
pressures: Kel must commit a vector with incomplete data.
The ship cannot both reinforce every shield and maintain full transport lock.
phases.directorPurpose: Captain Rhee leads the final shuttle extraction while the player commands the Eudora Vale, transporters, traffic control, and load response.
playerFacingObjectives: Prevent the station from becoming a debris cascade.

phases.title: The Captain Falls
phases.summary: A secondary inversion destroys Rhee's shuttle after the final evacuees transport clear. The player must keep the system response moving while the bridge confirms command succession.
objectives: Confirm casualties and chain of command.
Maintain active rescue and load control.
pressures: The crew has no time for a full memorial response.
Regional authorities demand a public explanation.
The next load transfer requires a captain's authorization.
phases.directorPurpose: A secondary inversion destroys Rhee's shuttle after the final evacuees transport clear. The player must keep the system response moving while the bridge confirms command succession.
playerFacingObjectives: Confirm casualties and chain of command.
Maintain active rescue and load control.

phases.title: The First Allocation
phases.summary: The acting captain must choose how to stabilize the linked system: shed load to a world, risk the ship as a bridge, accept station loss, or construct another defensible plan.
objectives: Preserve a record of the decision and uncertainty.
pressures: Every option has planetary or ship consequences.
The replacement captain clock begins politically, not mechanically.
The crew watches how command handles uncertainty.
phases.directorPurpose: The acting captain must choose how to stabilize the linked system: shed load to a world, risk the ship as a bridge, accept station loss, or construct another defensible plan.
playerFacingObjectives: Preserve a record of the decision and uncertainty.

phases.title: Acting Captain
phases.summary: With immediate casualties stabilized or transformed into continuing emergencies, the player defines the Acting XO arrangement, reporting line, evidence posture, and first regional priorities.
objectives: Report Rhee's death and acting command.
Select immediate follow-up work without freezing the wider system.
pressures: Crew grief and operational demand coexist.
Osei needs a documented succession record.
phases.directorPurpose: With immediate casualties stabilized or transformed into continuing emergencies, the player defines the Acting XO arrangement, reporting line, evidence posture, and first regional priorities.
playerFacingObjectives: Report Rhee's death and acting command.
Select immediate follow-up work without freezing the wider system.

directorFocusRules.summary: Preserve player command agency and accept freeform plans that satisfy visible constraints.
Every technical success moves burden, risk, evidence, or legitimacy somewhere visible.

competencePolicy.playerCompetence: The player character is a trained Starfleet officer. Apply routine competence before asking for checks.
competencePolicy.crewCompetence: Senior staff act professionally within their disciplines and report material risks.

decisionPoints.title: The First Sacrifice
decisionPoints.prompt: How will the Eudora Vale stop the opening surge, and which population, system, or ship capability will carry the immediate cost?

decisionPoints.title: Executive Coverage
decisionPoints.prompt: Who will exercise Acting XO authority, and what decisions may they make without returning every issue to the new captain?

commandDecisions.title: The First Sacrifice
commandDecisions.summary: How will the Eudora Vale stop the opening surge, and which population, system, or ship capability will carry the immediate cost?
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Apply consequences through lattice-integrity, distribution-equity, resource-reserves, crew-command-confidence.

commandDecisions.title: Executive Coverage
commandDecisions.summary: Who will exercise Acting XO authority, and what decisions may they make without returning every issue to the new captain?
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Apply consequences through crew-command-confidence, command-culture, thread.ren-acting-xo.

endStates.title: The Captain's Chair Complete
endStates.summary: The mission resolves and transitions to chapter-1-bread-and-weather.

endStates.summary: The mission goal changes under pressure while the campaign continues.
